assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 18-29: '## Code Intelligence' heading followed by 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' and an example using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 31: '### Limitations' appears as a subheading under the '## Code Intelligence' section (line 18), followed by 'No limitations known -- no Serena instance limitations reported.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-12: 'Two Serena MCP server instances were discovered by scanning tool name prefixes matching the pattern `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`: 1. **serena_backend** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__` (10 tools...) 2. **serena_ui** -- identified from tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__` (10 tools...)'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 3-9 list preserved existing content: '## Preserved (existing content)' lists '# my-project heading and description', '## Documentation section', '## Getting Started section'. The changes log explicitly shows 3 sections were preserved ('Sections preserved: 3'). While the Project Configuration sections were all newly added, the log does NOT indicate 'all sections were newly added' -- it indicates existing CLAUDE.md content was preserved. This contradicts the assertion that this is a greenfield setup with no preserved entries.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path -- matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 5: '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' -- the table header contains exactly the four required columns in the correct order.
